author: FijaEE
name: PR #1797 + SmearGate BOS Fix + 9-Hparam + EMBED_CLIP Relax — non-record reproduction with ablation stack
blurb: Functional reproduction of the PR #1797 stack on 8xH100 SXM, with the SmearGate BOS-leak fix from PR #1851 inlined and PR #1855's 9-hparam stack adopted, plus a single one-line tweak (EMBED_CLIP_SIGMAS 14 -> 20) that empirically saved ~280 KB of compressed artifact and brought the run under the 16 MB cap. 3-seed mean val_bpb 1.06122 (std 0.00104) is statistically equivalent to PR #1797 (1.06157 +/- 0.00066, Welch t = -0.49, p ~= 0.32). Submitted as non-record because the 0.00091-nat improvement is well below the 0.005-nat record bar. The submission additionally documents five orthogonal ablations whose negative results clarify why several intuitively appealing knobs do not transfer to this 5M-param + 16 MB regime.
base_submission: PR #1797 (dexhunter) + PR #1787 (nprime06) + PR #1729 (romeerp CaseOps) + PR #1851 (aquariouseworkman BOS fix) + PR #1855 (codemath3000 9-hparam stack)

ablations_documented.name: NGramMixer V1 (bigram + Dirichlet)
ablations_documented.lesson: Cold-start uniform q_bi injects noise; backoff is essential.

ablations_documented.name: TempScaler V2 (per-doc running entropy)
ablations_documented.lesson: CE-trained NN already optimally calibrated; temperature has no headroom.

ablations_documented.name: TokenPPMMixer V3 (PPM-D order-2 token)
ablations_documented.lesson: Token alphabet (V=8192) has too sparse contexts for PPM to fire confidently; byte-level PPM works because 256-symbol alphabet saturates contexts at order-5.

ablations_documented.name: SP10240 + CaseOps (vocab progression)
ablations_documented.result: Single seed: -0.0015 BPB pre-TTT but +0.0017 BPB post-TTT, artifact 16.49 MB over cap
ablations_documented.lesson: Larger vocab does not transfer when the parameter budget (5M) cannot absorb the long tail; embedding table grows ~25%.

ablations_documented.name: EMBED_BITS=6 (artifact reduction)
ablations_documented.lesson: INT6 embeddings are too lossy for the per-token softmax precision the eval BPB requires.

compressor_findings.brotli_q11: Smallest output for quantized weight blobs in our setting (16,140,160 bytes baseline before EMBED_CLIP relax)
compressor_findings.lzma_p6: +1.1 MB worse than brotli q=11 on identical config
compressor_findings.lzma_p9_extreme: +1.7 MB worse than brotli q=11 on identical config

key_takeaway: PR #1855's 9-hparam stack with EMBED_CLIP_SIGMAS=20 (instead of the published 14) saves ~280 KB of compressed artifact and brings the same training config under the 16 MB cap with 3-seed BPB statistically equivalent to PR #1797.
reproducibility_notes: Run runpod/phase_q_embedclip20.sh inside an 8xH100 SXM pod with HF_TOKEN, RUNPOD_API_KEY, RUNPOD_POD_ID set. The script clones this branch, pulls SP8192 CaseOps shards from hf://datasets/FijaEE/parameter-golf-sp8192-caseops, runs all three seeds end-to-end (each ~22 min), pushes per-seed CSV to the HF dataset for out-of-band inspection, and self-stops the pod via runpodctl + GraphQL on completion or on any abort guard (artifact > 16 MB, BPB > 1.061, or hard-deadline 100 min).
